programs.title: Shetland
programs.desc: Perez tries to get the measure of Lloyd. Evidence emerges of another bombmaker. The net closes in around Martin. Sandy uncovers Connor's interest in a piece of local history.

programs.title: Elementary
programs.desc: Holmes returns to New York with a new apprentice and a renewed interest in working with the NYPD after being fired by London's MI6. Unfortunately, Joan, the NYPD's new go-to PI, must give her approval first.

programs.title: ER
programs.desc: Going into harm's way, Carter returns to the Congo to search for Luka's body despite the chaos and danger of a civil war. Taken prisoner by rebel troops, Luka's fate is revealed from the time Carter left 22 days earlier.

programs.title: Like A Version - triple j
programs.desc: Gigi Perez covers Lana Del Rey's 'Summertime Sadness' for Like A Version.

programs.title: QI
programs.desc: Joining QI master Stephen Fry are Phill Jupitus, Jo Brand, Jessica Stevenson and Alan Davies. This episode is themed around domesticity and the panellists' buzzers are all domestic noises. (Final).

programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are David Baddiel, Ed Balls, Jo Brand and Kimberly Wyatt.
